-   More
    
    [Documentation](https://support.lilt.com/kb/LILT-mcp)[Privacy Policy](https://lilt.com/legal/privacy)[Support](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#bbc8cecbcbd4c9cffbd7d2d7cf95d8d4d6)
    

Seamlessly integrate high-quality, guaranteed translation capabilities directly into your Claude instance, bringing your brand's unique context where you already work. Submit content for brand-aligned translation via customized AI or human-verified translation with a simple prompt, ensuring the highest quality while you maintain full control.

You can use LILT to:

**Instant Translation:**  
"Translate this marketing copy to Spanish"

**Verified Translation Jobs:**  
"Create a human-verified translation of this contract to French"

**Check Credits:**  
"How many translation credits do I have remaining?"

**Monitor Jobs:**  
"What's the status of my German translation project?"
